name: good_regulator_station
description: Complete regulator station with coordinated PFD/P&ID tags, OPP setpoint basis, vent, drain, sensing line, and revisions.

sheets.text:
DRAWING NO: M-100
SHEET TITLE: PROCESS FLOW DIAGRAM
REV: A
